module.name: fishbone
module.description: A fishbone (Ishikawa) cause-and-effect diagram: spine to the effect head, category bones above/below with their causes. First section = effect, each following = "Category" + cause lines.
module.aiSpec:
A FISHBONE (Ishikawa) cause-and-effect diagram — a spine pointing at an effect on the right, with category "bones" branching above and below, each listing its causes.
Body: split the sections with `<!-- @ -->`. - The FIRST section = the EFFECT (the head box, right side). Markdown allowed. - Each following section = one CATEGORY bone: its FIRST LINE is the category name, the remaining lines are that category's causes (one cause per line; a leading "- " is stripped). Categories alternate above/below the spine. Keep to <= 6 categories and <= 4 causes each.
When NOT to use: for general node graphs use @mermaid; for a linear process use @flow.
Parameters: - `color` : spine, bones and category accent. Default var(--accent-color). CSS color. - `headcolor` : accent for the effect head box only. Default blank = same as `color`. - `showcauses`: true/false — show the cause lines under each category. Default true (false shows just the category names, for a high-level view). - `compact` : true/false — denser text and smaller boxes. Default false. - `headwidth` : max width of the effect head box in px. Default 200. Range 80–400.
<!-- @fishbone color: #c0392b, compact: true --> Late delivery <!-- @ --> People Training Staffing <!-- @ --> Process Handoffs Approvals <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Spine, bones and category accent color.

param.name: headcolor
param.label: Head color
param.desc: Accent for the effect head box; blank = same as accent color.

param.name: showcauses
param.label: Show causes
param.desc: Show the cause lines under each category (off = names only).

param.name: headwidth
param.label: Head width (px)
param.desc: Maximum width of the effect head box.

snippet.label: Fishbone (Ishikawa)
snippet.text: <!-- @fishbone --> Effect <!-- @ --> People cause 1 cause 2 <!-- @ --> Process cause 3 cause 4 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Effect head + category bones with causes, alternating above/below.
